concept: Alliance / A Bond of Active Care
description: A purposeful bond formed between groups or individuals for mutual benefit and shared goals. It is a strategic and generative union to achieve a common purpose.
rationale: Composed from the established root 'thea' (active, tender care) and a new proposed root 'wo' (a bond, an oath). The word's structure literally means 'a bond of active care.' This frames an alliance not just as a strategic agreement, but as a living bond that requires ongoing care and commitment from all parties.
